title: Choosing a specific group when importing excel
excerpt: Today, when an excel file is importing, the imported data is automatically added to a new group. Could we get a feature that will allow a selection of the group to import the date into?

posts.author: heatherrodriguez (Heather Rodriguez)
posts.cookedHtml: Today, when an excel file is importing, the imported data is automatically added to a new group. Could we get a feature that will allow a selection of the group to import the date into?
